text: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
tl: Iqtarabatis Saa'atu wan-shaqqal qamar

text: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, \"Passing magic.\"
tl: Wa-ien yaraw aayataien yu'ridoo Wa-yaqooloo sihrun mustamirr

text: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.
tl: Wa-kazzaboo wattaba'ooo ahwaaa'ahum; Wa-kullu amrin mustaqirr

text: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.
tl: Wa-laqad jaaa'ahum minal anbaaa'i maa feehi muzdajar

text: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
tl: Hikmatun baalighatun famaa tughnin nuzur

text: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
tl: Fatawalla 'anhum; yawma yad'ud daa'i ilaa shai-'in nukur

text: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
tl: Khushsha'an absaaruhum yakhrujoona minal ajdaasi ka-annahum jaraadum muntashir

text: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, \"This is a difficult Day.\"
tl: Muhti'eena ilad daa'i yaqoolul kaafiroona haazaa yawmun 'asir

text: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, \"A madman,\" and he was repelled.
tl: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohin fakazzaboo 'abdanaa Wa-qaaloo majnoonunw wazdujir

text: So he invoked his Lord, \"Indeed, I am overpowered, so help.\"
tl: Fada'aa Rabbahooo annee maghloobun fantasir

text: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
tl: Fafatahnaaa abwaabas samaaa'i bi-maaa'in munhamir

text: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
tl: Wa-fajjarnal arda 'uyoonan faltaqal maaa'u 'alaaa amrin qad qudir

text: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
tl: Wa-hamalnaahu 'alaa zaati alwaahinw Wa-dusur

text: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
tl: Tajree bi-a'yuninaa jazaaa'an liman kaana kufir

text: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqat taraknaahaa aayatan fahal min muddakir

text: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
tl: Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana liz-zikri fahal min muddakir

text: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
tl: Kazzabat 'Aadun fakaifa kaana 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
tl: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim reehan sarsaran fee Yawmi nahsin mustamirr

text: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
tl: Tanzi'un naasa ka-annahum a'jaazu nakhlin munqa'ir

text: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
tl: Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana liz-zikri fahal min muddakir

text: Thamūd denied the warning.
tl: Kazzabat Samoodu binnuzur

text: And said, \"Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
tl: Faqaalooo a'-basharan minnaa waahidan nattabi'uhooo innaa izal lafee dalaalinw Wa-su'ur

text: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar.\"
tl: A-ulqiyaz zikru 'alaihi min baininaa bal huwa kazzaabun ashir

text: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
tl: Sa-ya'lamoona ghadan manil kazzaabul ashir

text: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
tl: Innaa mursilun naaqati fitnatan lahum fartaqibhum wastabir

text: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
tl: Wa-nabbi'hum annal maaa'a qismatun bainahum kullu shirbin muhtadar

text: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
tl: Fa-naadaw saahibahum fa-ta'aataa fa-'aqar

text: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
tl: Fakaifa kaana 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.
tl: Innaaa arsalnaa 'alaihim saihatanw waahidatan fakaanoo kahasheemil muhtazir

text: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana liz-zikri fahal min muddakir

text: The people of Lot denied the warning.
tl: Kazzabat qawmu lootin binnuzur

text: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.
tl: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim haasiban illaaa aala Lootin najjainaahum bisahar

text: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
tl: Ni'matan min 'indinaa; kazaalika najzee man shakar

text: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.
tl: Wa-laqad anzarahum batshatanaa fatamaaraw binnuzur

text: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], \"Taste My punishment and warning.\"
tl: Wa-laqad raawadoohu 'an daifeehee fatamasnaaa a'yunahum fazooqoo 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.
tl: Wa-laqad sabbahahum bukratan 'azaabun mustaqirr

text: So taste My punishment and warning.
tl: Fazooqoo 'azaabee Wa-nuzur

text: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana liz-zikri fahal min muddakir

text: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.
tl: Wa-laqad jaaa'a Aala Fir'awnan nuzur

text: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.
tl: Kazzaboo bi-Aayaatinaa kullihaa fa-akhaznaahum akhza 'azeezim muqtadir

text: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?
tl: A-kuffaarukum khairun min ulaaa'ikum am lakum baraaa'atun fiz Zubur

text: Or do they say, \"We are an assembly supporting [each other]\"?
tl: Am yaqooloona nahnu jamee'un muntasir

text: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
tl: Sa-yuhzamul jam'u Wa-yuwalloonad dubur

text: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.
tl: Balis Saa'atu maw'iduhum was-Saa'atu adhaa Wa-amarr

text: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness..
tl: Innal mujrimeena fee dalaalinw Wa-su'ur

text: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], \"Taste the touch of Saqar.\"
tl: Yawma yus-haboona fin Naari 'alaa wujoohihim zooqoo massa saqar

text: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
tl: Innaa kulla shai'in khalaqnaahu bi-qadar

text: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
tl: Wa-maaa amrunaaa illaa waahidatun ka-lamhin bil-basar

text: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?
tl: Wa-laqad ahlaknaaa ashyaa'akum fahal min muddakir

text: And everything they did is in written records.
tl: Wa-kullu shai'in fa'aloohu fiz Zubur

text: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
tl: Wa-kullu sagheerinw Wa-kabeerin mustatar

text: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
tl: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw Wa-nahar

text: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
tl: Fee maq'adi sidqin 'inda Maleekin Muqtadir
